vocab.meaning: thích thú/tìm thấy niềm vui từ điều gì
vocab.example: As a youngster, I really got a kick out of watching the landscape transform as we drove from the city to the countryside.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi bầu không khí/phong cảnh
vocab.example: I loved car trips because they offered a much-needed change of scenery from my usual school routine.

vocab.word: be on the edge of one's seat
vocab.ipa: /bi ɒn ðə edʒ əv wʌnz siːt/
vocab.meaning: hào hứng, phấn khích (mong đợi điều gì đó)
vocab.example: I would be on the edge of my seat whenever we approached the mountains, waiting to catch a glimpse of the peaks.

vocab.meaning: ở nơi xa xôi hẻo lánh
vocab.example: We often ended up in the middle of nowhere during our road trips, which felt like a massive adventure to my younger self.
I used to lose track of time while looking out the window, completely engrossed in my own thoughts.

vocab.meaning: quan sát thế giới trôi qua (một cách chậm rãi)
vocab.example: There was something deeply relaxing about sitting in the back seat and just watching the world go by.

vocab.meaning: chúng ta đã đến nơi chưa? (câu nói kinh điển của trẻ em khi đi xe)
vocab.example: I’m sure I drove my parents crazy by constantly asking 'are we there yet?' every twenty minutes.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: Looking back, those family car journeys were when I had the time of my life, free from any real-world worries.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng lại những kỷ niệm cũ
vocab.example: Talking about these car trips really makes me go down memory lane to a much simpler time.
The excitement I felt when we were finally ready to hit the road for a long trip was truly unparalleled.
